sys_ui_page.html:
DTech Apps by Discover Technologies LLC

October27, 2024

Tasker Privacy Policy

This privacy policy outlines how Discover Technologies collects, uses, stores, and shares data within the Tasker application, including when data may be transferred or processed outside of the ServiceNow platform.

Collected Data

Tasker collects the following types of data:

  • Documents: Documents uploaded by end users and attachments within ServiceNow.
  • ServiceNow Record Field Data: Specific data from ServiceNow record fields.
    • Data about Tasks defining the purpose of the task, due date, assignment, priority, classification, state and status.
    • Data about Organizational Units.
    • Data about Members of Organizational Units and their Roles in the Organizational Units.
    • Templates: Templates used to generate recurring Tasks and recurring Task Schedules.

Data Usage

  • Documents and Attachments:
    • DocIntegrator Documents when used with Tasker:
      • If Tasker is used with DocIntegrator, documents may be stored in SharePoint O365 or SharePoint On-Premises.
      • DocIntegrator provides in-browser and in-app document editing and team collaboration features.
      • Refer to the DocIntegrator Privacy Policy for specific data sharing details.
    • If Tasker is used with ServiceNow attachments, the documents are stored in the ServiceNow Instance attachments table.
    • No data is sent outside or used by Discover Technologies
  • ServiceNow Record Field Data:
    • All Tasker data is stored and retrieved in and retrieved from the ServiceNow instance.
    • DocIntegrator Configuration records when used with Tasker:
      • Refer to the DocIntegrator Privacy Policy for specific data sharing details.
  • DocGenerator Templates (when used with the Task and Task Templates):
    • Refer to the DocGenerator Privacy Policy for specific data usage details.

Data Sharing

  • Third Parties: Tasker does not share your data with third parties.
  • Data Storage:
    • All Task, Template and Organizational Structure data is stored in ServiceNow databases controlled by the customer.
    • When DocIntegrator is used, data is stored within Microsoft O365, Microsoft SharePoint On-Premises, and Microsoft Teams systems, which are controlled by the customer.
      • Refer to the DocIntegrator Privacy Policy for specific data sharing details.
  • DocGenerator Templates (when used with Tasks and Templates): Refer to the DocGenerator Privacy Policy for specific data sharing details.

Data Transfer, Storage, and Security

  • Data Transfer: All data is transferred using industry-standard HTTPS (TLS) encryption.
  • Data Storage: Data is stored according to the security and privacy capabilities provided by the ServiceNow Repository controlled by the customer
  • DocIntegrator Documents when used with Tasker:
    • Data is stored according to the security and privacy capabilities provided by Microsoft O365, SharePoint Online, SharePoint On-Premises, and Microsoft Teams.
    • Refer to the DocIntegrator Privacy Policy for specific data sharing details.
  • DocGenerator Templates (when used with DocFlow feature): Refer to the DocGenerator Privacy Policy for specific data security details.

Links:

https://www.servicenow.com/service-privacy.html

Legal Disclaimers:

  • Data Control: Customers maintain control over their data within the ServiceNow systems used by Tasker.
  • Data Retention: Data is retained in accordance with customer configurations and applicable legal requirements.
  • Data Access: Customers can access and manage their data through the ServiceNow systems used by Tasker.
  • Data Security: Discover Technologies takes reasonable measures to protect data within Tasker but cannot guarantee absolute security.
  • Changes to Policy: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Please check back periodically for any changes.
sys_ui_page.name: AppPrivacyPolicy
